result.title: Centr: Personal Fitness App
result.description:
Try the Centr App FREE for 7 days, cancel anytime.

CNET: Best Workout Subscription Apps for 2025
Good Housekeeping: The Best Workout Apps for All Fitness Levels
Tom’s Guide: Best Phone apps in 2025
POPSUGAR: Best Strength Training Program  
MEN’S HEALTH: Home Gym Awards

Centr’s Fitness app provides personalized training based on your personal goals, preferences, and skill level. Whether you prefer home or gym workouts, Centr offers training options for every skill level, and the first ever HYROX-certified training program. Improve your strength, endurance, and physique with a workout plan that is right for you.

Download Centr today and start your FREE 7 Day Trial!

CENTR FEATURES

CUSTOM WORKOUTS FOR YOUR FITNESS GOALS
 - Personalized training based on your personal goals, preferences, and skill level.
- Fitness and training options for men and women.
- Workouts for beginners, intermediate, and advanced.
- Options for strength, weight loss, or getting fit & toned.

WORKOUT ANYTIME, ANYWHERE
- Press play at the gym or at home.
 Training is simple with self-guided and coached workout options.

FEWER DECISIONS, BETTER RESULTS
-Never stress about your fitness routine again. We'll select your daily workout and meals based on your goals and preferences.

PERFECT FOR BUSY PEOPLE
- With Workouts that run from 5 minutes to 60 minutes, we have options that fit the busiest schedule.

HYROX TRAINING
- Ready to train for HYROX? Centr’s certified training program will have you build the power and endurance you need to conquer race day in just 12 weeks! New to HYROX? Seasoned-Pro? We’ve got unique plans just for you.

MOTIVATION
- Get excited to workout again with Centr’s world-class coaches; they’ll keep you coming back for more!

ENDLESS WORKOUT OPTIONS 
- Strength, HIIT, muscle-building, Pilates, yoga, boxing, MMA, hybrid training, and more. 
- Filter by body part, or equipment type.

BETTER RESULTS WITH YOUR OWN MEAL PLAN
- Centr provides an expert-approved meal plan with dishes based on your food preferences.
- Eat easy, healthy food you actually love to meet your fitness goals.
- Veggie lover, carnivore, or anything in between – there’s something just for you.

CASTING & WATCHES
- Centr workouts and fitness tracking is compatible with casting, tablets, and Wear OS.

MEET YOUR COACHES
- Luke Zocchi: Chris Hemsworth’s personal trainer
- Ingrid Clay: HIIT HIRT Strength trainer & plant-based chef
- Alexz Parvi: HILIT trainer
- Dan Churchill: Cookbook author & nutrition coach
- Maricris Lapaix: Beginner Cardio & Strength trainer
- Tahl Rinsky: Dynamic yoga instructor
- Sylvia Roberts: Pilates instructor
- Angie Asche: Dietitian & nutrition expert
- Jess Kilts: Strength & conditioning trainer
- Bobby Holland Hanton: Hollywood stuntman
- Ashley Joi: Cardio & strength trainer
- Joseph Sakoda AKA ‘Da Rulk’: Special Ops trainer
- Michael Olajide Jr.: Boxing champion & supermodel trainer
- Torre Washington: Vegan bodybuilder
- Jorge Blanco: Boxing & MMA coach

-----
Unlock your full potential by starting with 7 days free on Centr
-----
Memberships available for 1, 3 and 12 months.

Payment will be charged to your Google Play account at confirmation of purchase and will automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of your current period. Your Google Play account will automatically be charged within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period.

Current subscriptions may not be canceled during the active subscription period, but you can manage subscriptions and/or turn off auto-renewal by visiting your Google Play Account Settings after purchase.

Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when a subscription is purchased for that publication, where applicable.

Read full Terms of Service & Privacy Policy: https://centr.com/article/show/5293/privacy-policy & https://centr.com/article/show/5294/terms-and-condition

result.summary: Fitness tracking, personal training, core workouts for your daily fitness goals
result.developerLegalAddress: 3300 Horseless Carriage Dr, Norco, CA 92860-3635, United States
result.recentChanges:
This release includes a number of bug fixes that were causing the app to crash or fail to store your workout progress - our apologies!

If you have any questions or need a hand, please contact our Support team - support@centr.com
